helplines.label: BWSSB 24/7 Helpline
helplines.description: Water supply issues, leakages, billing complaints

onlinePortals.label: BWSSB CMS Portal (Bills & Complaints)
onlinePortals.purpose: View bills, pay online, file complaints, track status

onlinePortals.label: Jala Doota App
onlinePortals.purpose: Mobile app for water supply complaints

steps.sla: Response within 4 hours for complete outages

steps.action: Register complaint on CMS Portal with your RR Number
If no response in 24 hours, escalate to Sub-Division Engineer
Verify meter reading matches your meter
File complaint on CMS portal under 'Billing Grievance'
Visit Sub-Division Office with physical bill and meter photos
Escalate to Executive Engineer if unresolved
Call 1916 — emergency pipe burst gets priority
Take photo and register on CMS portal
File meter replacement request on CMS portal
Meter replacement done free of cost if defective on BWSSB side
Register complaint on CMS portal under 'Water Pressure'
If area-wide issue, BWSSB may schedule booster pumping

escalationLadder.note: For persistent unresolved issues. Filing fee waived for claims below ₹5 Lakh for senior citizens.

rtiTemplate.subject: Status of Complaint / Information Request under RTI Act 2005
rtiTemplate.authority: Public Information Officer, Bangalore Water Supply and Sewerage Board
rtiTemplate.address: BWSSB Head Office, Cauvery Bhavan, K.G. Road, Bengaluru – 560 009
rtiTemplate.template:
I, [YOUR NAME], son/daughter of [PARENT NAME], residing at [YOUR ADDRESS], Bengaluru – [PIN], wish to seek the following information under the Right to Information Act, 2005:

1. Current status and action taken on complaint number [COMPLAINT ID] filed on [DATE] regarding [BRIEF DESCRIPTION OF ISSUE].
2. Name and designation of the officer responsible for resolving this complaint.
3. Expected resolution timeline.

I am depositing ₹10/- as RTI fee [by IPO/court fee stamp/online].

Date:
Place: Bengaluru
Signature:
Name:
Address:
Contact Number:
